ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the measurement belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that took the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "density_1" REAL /* Density at the first point */,
  "density_2" REAL /* Density at the second point */,
  "pressure_1" REAL /* Pressure at the first point */,
  "pressure_2" REAL /* Pressure at the second point */,
  "temperature_1" REAL /* Temperature at the first point */,
  "temperature_2" REAL /* Temperature at the second point */,
  "enthalpy_1" REAL /* Enthalpy at the first point */,
  "enthalpy_2" REAL /* Enthalpy at the second point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the measurement (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update to the project details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, density) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Calibration interval in days */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor assignment */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is assigned */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_assignments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., report, design, specification) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the document */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file in bytes */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the document for easier search and categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., login, data upload, project update) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the event (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
